summary: Phase 6 Clinical (Treatment Plans + Re-Exams) verified end-to-end on the public URL https://demo-cleanup.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest /app/backend/tests/test_clinical_phase6.py: 14/14 PASSED in 13.14s — covers plan CRUD + PATCH + set-status(reason), one-active-plan-per-episode guard (409 w/ existing id surfaced), PATCH on discharged plan (409), live progress computed from signed follow-up notes on same episode (visits_completed=1 → percent=25 with total_visits=4), diagnosis cross-patient linkage (400), follow-up note active_plan_summary hydration, re-exam auto-link to active plan + initial_exam + frozen baseline_snapshot (plan.baselines + plan.goals + initial exam findings), one-reexam-per-encounter idempotency (200 + X-ReExam-Existed=true), cancelled encounter rejected (409), PATCH goal_progress + outcome_updates typed round-trip, bad goal_id (400), sign w/o recommendation (400), sign-with-modify_plan emits clinical.re_exam.signed audit entry + does NOT auto-mutate plan, new_diagnoses materialize to clinical_diagnoses with uppercased code (M54.4), signed re-exam PATCH (409), narrative renders RE-EXAMINATION NOTE / BASELINE (frozen) / GOAL PROGRESS / OUTCOME MEASURES / RECOMMENDATION sections, care-timeline merges treatment_plan + re_exam + initial_exam + encounter kinds, summary.treatment_plans.{total,open} + summary.re_exams.{total,open} counts live, cross-tenant GET 404 + reauth-required 401 on plan write. Phase 5 regression pytest: 12/12 PASSED in 8.73s — no regression. Frontend Playwright E2E (group-admin@sunrise.ccms.app): Clinical tab renders stat-treatment-plans + stat-reexams tiles, treatment-plans-card + reexams-card mounted, placeholder-treatment-plans + placeholder-re-exams gone. Seeded plan row plan-row-{id}/status/progress visible; plan-create-btn present. TreatmentPlanEditor at /patients/{pid}/clinical/treatment-plans/{tpid}: all 19 probed testids present (plan-title, plan-freq-week, plan-total-visits, plan-duration-weeks, plan-interventions, plan-goals, plan-baseline-pain, plan-home-care, plan-discharge-criteria, plan-save-btn, plan-set-status-btn, plan-status-badge, plan-progress, plan-progress-text, plan-section-overview/goals/baselines, plan-intervention-add, plan-goal-add). EncountersCard: re_evaluation encounter emits encounter-start-reexam-{id} (no encounter-start-exam-{id} regression). ReExamEditor at /patients/{pid}/clinical/re-exams/{rid}: 21/21 testids present (reexam-editor, reexam-status-badge, reexam-plan-snapshot, reexam-section-baseline/goals/findings/outcomes/recommendation, reexam-goal-list, reexam-outcome-add, reexam-decision-group + all 4 decision radios, reexam-decision-reason, reexam-save/mark-ready/sign/narrative/back-link, reexam-visit-number). Goal rows auto-seed from plan goals (2 rows, each with baseline/current/status/note). reexam-revised-summary is conditionally shown ONLY when decision==modify_plan (hidden on load, visible after clicking reexam-decision-modify_plan). reexam-sign-btn disabled while dirty (correct). reexam-narrative-btn opens reexam-narrative-dialog with reexam-narrative-text containing BASELINE (frozen), server-rendered narrative. Timeline: timeline-entry-treatment_plan-{plan_id} + timeline-entry-re_exam-{rx_id} both rendered alongside existing encounter/exam entries. reexams-card lists reexam-row-{id} with status chip.
verified_flows: POST /api/patients/{pid}/clinical/treatment-plans 201 with default plan_status=active, goals get ids, progress.total_visits populated, progress.percent=0 on fresh
POST second active plan on same episode → 409 with existing plan id in detail; after set-status on_hold, new plan creates OK
PATCH plan updates title/goals/frequency; set-status active→discharged requires reason and sets discharged_at; PATCH on discharged → 409
Diagnosis linkage: diagnosis belonging to other patient → 400
Plan progress: visits_completed increments live from signed follow-up notes on same episode since plan start_date; percent math correct
Follow-up note GET returns active_plan_summary with id/title/frequency/goals[3]/progress when active plan on episode

POST /api/patients/{pid}/clinical/re-exams on re_evaluation encounter → 201, auto-links treatment_plan_id + initial_exam_id, freezes baseline_snapshot.plan.baselines + plan.goals + initial_exam findings
Duplicate POST same encounter → 200 + X-ReExam-Existed:true
Cancelled encounter → 409
PATCH goal_progress/outcome_updates/recommendation_decision/reason round-trip; bad goal_id → 400
SIGN without recommendation_decision → 400; SIGN with modify_plan → 200 + clinical.re_exam.signed audit emitted + plan unchanged (audit-only, no auto-mutation); signed PATCH → 409
SIGN materializes new_diagnoses into clinical_diagnoses (icd10_code uppercased)
GET /narrative renders RE-EXAMINATION NOTE / BASELINE (frozen) / GOAL PROGRESS / OUTCOME MEASURES / RECOMMENDATION
GET /care-timeline includes treatment_plan + re_exam + initial_exam + encounter kinds, sorted date-desc; ids round-trip
GET /clinical/summary returns treatment_plans.{total,open} + re_exams.{total,open} counts
Cross-tenant (admin@ccms.app on Sunrise plan) → 404
Reauth required: plan create w/o x-reauth-token → 401 'reauth-required'
Frontend: Clinical tab stat-treatment-plans + stat-reexams tiles, treatment-plans-card, reexams-card, placeholders gone
Frontend: plan-create-btn + plan-row-{id}/-status/-progress; TreatmentPlanEditor 19 testids OK
Frontend: EncountersCard emits encounter-start-reexam-{id} ONLY for re_evaluation (not encounter-start-exam)
Frontend: ReExamEditor 21 testids OK, goal rows auto-seeded from plan, reexam-revised-summary conditional on decision=modify_plan, sign-btn disabled while dirty, narrative dialog renders
Frontend: Care timeline renders timeline-entry-treatment_plan-{id} + timeline-entry-re_exam-{id}
critical_code_review_comments: services/clinical/treatment_plans_router.py — one-active-plan-per-episode guard returns 409 w/ existing plan id in detail (excellent UX contract). set-status transitions require reason for discharged/cancelled. PATCH correctly rejects on discharged/completed/cancelled (409). Plan progress computed live from signed follow-up notes joined on episode + start_date — no denormalized counter drift.

services/clinical/reexams_router.py — _build_baseline_snapshot freezes plan + initial exam + prior reexam into a read-only dict, eliminating time-travel concerns. Sign endpoint requires recommendation_decision (400 otherwise). modify_plan decision is audit-only (clinical.re_exam.signed audit event), NOT auto-mutation — matches (2a) guardrail exactly. new_diagnoses materialize same-semantics as Initial Exam (code uppercased, is_primary preserved).
services/clinical/router.py summary extension — treatment_plans.open = active-status count; re_exams.open = draft+sign_ready count; both counts computed server-side (no frontend recompute needed).

services/clinical/notes_router.py _hydrate — active_plan_summary exposes plan id/title/frequency/top-3 goals + progress for the follow-up note editor strip; care-timeline merges both new kinds cleanly.
core/db.py — clinical_reexams.encounter_id unique index enforces one-reexam-per-encounter at the DB level (defense-in-depth beyond the router idempotency guard).

frontend/pages/clinical/ReExamEditor.jsx — goal rows auto-seed from baseline_snapshot.plan.goals; reexam-revised-summary only rendered when decision==modify_plan; sign-btn disabled while dirty (prevents unsaved-state signing); signed banner replaces editable form post-sign.
frontend/pages/clinical/TreatmentPlanEditor.jsx — structured sections (overview/interventions/goals/baselines/home-care/discharge); plan-set-status-btn opens dialog with required reason.

frontend/pages/clinical/EncountersCard.jsx — re_evaluation → encounter-start-reexam-{id} (not encounter-start-exam-{id}); new_patient_exam still → encounter-start-exam-{id}; follow_up/treatment_visit still → encounter-start-note-{id}. No regression vs Phase 5.
frontend/pages/clinical/CareTimelineCard.jsx — supports treatment_plan + re_exam kinds with distinct icons; timeline-entry-{kind}-{id} deep-link tokens emitted.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on stat tiles + cards + placeholder removal + editor testid coverage (TreatmentPlanEditor 19/19, ReExamEditor 21/21) + encounter-start-reexam routing + timeline kinds + narrative dialog + conditional revised-summary + sign-btn-dirty gating

test_credentials: group-admin@sunrise.ccms.app / Sunrise@ComplianceClinic1 (primary); admin@ccms.app / Admin@ComplianceClinic1 (Default tenant cross-tenant probe)
seed_data_creation: Sunrise tenant: patient 69361851-d893-473f-a761-907daebbd42e with episode + signed initial exam + active plan 9cbd6536-8b7b-4f86-8b1e-5506304c6924 (RX Plan, 12 visits, 2 goals) + re-eval encounter 19611849-3f7a-4506-b1e2-a86c05862bcc + draft re-exam a2847ba1-c5b5-40ae-9963-a4e1c8511554 (used for UI deep-link). Pytest suite seeds its own per-test fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 is GA-worthy. Pattern for future Phase 7+ agents: login group-admin@sunrise → seed backend via Python requests (not in-browser fetch — the app has a global fetch/axios interceptor that consumes the body on non-2xx responses, so reusing responses in page.evaluate triggers 'body stream already read'). After Python seeding (see /tmp/seed_reexam.py as template), deep-link directly to /patients/{pid}/clinical/re-exams/{rid} or /patients/{pid}/clinical/treatment-plans/{tpid} — they route without reauth modal if access_token still fresh. EncountersCard routing: new_patient_exam → encounter-start-exam-{id}; follow_up/treatment_visit → encounter-start-note-{id}; re_evaluation → encounter-start-reexam-{id}. All writes require reauth (x-reauth-token); pytest login helper in test_clinical_phase6.py is reference. Narrative sections are text blobs with 'RE-EXAMINATION NOTE', 'BASELINE (frozen)', 'GOAL PROGRESS', 'OUTCOME MEASURES', 'RECOMMENDATION' headers. modify_plan audit: /api/audit-logs?entity_type=clinical_reexam&entity_id={rid} contains clinical.re_exam.signed action.
rca of the issue: No product bugs found. Single test-authoring note: in-browser fetch helpers must NOT re-read response.body after a non-2xx — the app's fetch interceptor reads the body once. Use Python requests for seeding from testing agents; use page.goto(...) to deep-link. The revised-summary conditional rendering, sign-dirty gating, and goal-row auto-seed all work as specified in the plan.
